temperatureEffects.effect: 1d6 lethal cold damage per minute, no save
Fort save or 1d6 nonlethal cold damage
Fort save or 1d6 nonlethal cold damage
Fort save or 1d4 nonlethal heat damage
Fort save or 1d4 nonlethal heat damage
1d6 lethal fire damage per minute + Fort save vs 1d4 nonlethal

windStrengths.name: Severe
windStrengths.note: Ranged attacks impossible for siege weapons only at -4

windStrengths.name: Windstorm
windStrengths.note: Ranged attacks impossible, blown away if Small

windStrengths.name: Hurricane
windStrengths.note: All ranged impossible, blown away if Medium or smaller

rules.crCalculation: Base CR + perception DC mod + disable DC mod + trigger mod + reset mod

allTraps.name: Pit Trap
allTraps.effect: 20-ft pit (2d6 falling damage); DC 20 Reflex avoids; multiple targets (all in 10-ft square)

allTraps.name: Arrow Trap
allTraps.effect: +10 ranged (1d8/x3); 1d4 arrows fire

allTraps.name: Spiked Pit Trap
allTraps.effect: 20-ft pit (2d6 falling + 1d4 spikes for 1d4+2 each); DC 20 Reflex avoids

allTraps.name: Rolling Boulder Trap
allTraps.effect: 10-ft diameter boulder (2d6 bludgeoning); 40 ft/round speed; multiple targets

allTraps.name: Spring-Loaded Spikes
allTraps.effect: +15 ranged (1d4 spikes, 1d4 damage each)

allTraps.name: Pendulum Blade Trap
allTraps.effect: +15 melee (2d6 slashing); swings every round, affects 10-ft width

allTraps.name: Crushing Wall Trap
allTraps.effect: 3d6 bludgeoning; walls close in 1 round; DC 20 Reflex for half and avoid trap, DC 25 Str to hold back

allTraps.name: Swinging Log Trap
allTraps.effect: +18 melee (2d8 bludgeoning); swings from ceiling

allTraps.name: Flooding Room Trap
allTraps.effect: Water fills sealed room in 4 rounds; DC 25 Swim to stay afloat; drowning after that

allTraps.name: Collapsing Ceiling Trap
allTraps.effect: 4d6 bludgeoning (DC 20 Reflex half); buries target under 5 ft of debris

allTraps.name: Bear Trap
allTraps.effect: Leg caught: 1d6 damage + grappled; DC 17 Escape Artist or 20 Str to break free

allTraps.name: Net Trap
allTraps.effect: Entangled: -2 Dex, -4 ranged, 50% melee miss; DC 20 Escape Artist or 22 Str to escape

allTraps.name: Tar Pit Trap
allTraps.effect: Speed reduced to 5 ft (DC 18 Reflex avoids); 1d3 rounds to escape with Escape Artist DC 15

allTraps.name: Poisoned Needle Trap
allTraps.effect: +12 ranged (1d2 plus poison: greenblood oil, Fort DC 13)

allTraps.name: Electricity Arc Trap
allTraps.effect: 4d6 electricity in 30-ft line; DC 16 Reflex half

allTraps.name: Wall Scythe Trap
allTraps.effect: +20 melee (2d4+6/x4); swings automatically

allTraps.name: Glyph of Warding Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: glyph (2d4 sonic or 1d8 per CL fire); DC 16 Reflex half

allTraps.name: Fire Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: fire trap (2d4 fire, DC 13 Reflex half); only when object opened

allTraps.name: Symbol of Pain Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: symbol of pain (1d6 Wisdom damage + pain, -4 on attacks/checks; Will DC 17 negates)

allTraps.name: Hold Person Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: hold person (humanoid only; Will DC 17 negates)

allTraps.name: Bestow Curse Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: bestow curse (Will DC 18 negates); -6 to ability, -4 to rolls, 50% action loss, or other

allTraps.name: Polymorph Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: polymorph other into small animal (Will DC 18 negates); mental abilities lost on second fail

allTraps.name: Maze Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: maze (creature trapped 1 minute/round spent lost; Will DC 19 disbelief)

allTraps.name: Phantasmal Killer Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: phantasmal killer (DC 16 Will disbelief, then DC 16 Fort or die)

allTraps.name: Lightning Bolt Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: lightning bolt (5d6, DC 14 Reflex half)

allTraps.name: Flame Strike Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: flame strike (8d6, half divine; DC 17 Reflex half)

allTraps.name: Meteor Storm Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: meteor storm (40-ft radius, 6d6 fire per meteors; DC 19 Reflex half)

allTraps.name: Finger of Death Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: finger of death (10d6 damage; Fort DC 20 half)

allTraps.name: Disintegration Trap
allTraps.effect: Spell effect: disintegrate (2d6 x 10 damage; Reflex DC 19 negates)

allTraps.name: Falling Objects Trap
allTraps.effect: 1d6 objects (1d6 damage each); DC 15 Reflex half for each

rules.desperation: Persistent haunt may increase manifestation range at death

allHaunts.name: Cold Spot
allHaunts.effect: 1d6 cold damage (Fort DC 11 negates); creatures shiver and shaken 1 round
allHaunts.destruction: Casting bless on the area; heating room above 65 degrees

allHaunts.name: Phantom Bleeding
allHaunts.effect: Bleed 1d6, creatures within area see phantom blood seeping from walls and floor
allHaunts.destruction: Finding and blessing the hidden corpse; casting consecrate on burial site

allHaunts.name: Spectral Touch
allHaunts.effect: 1d6 negative energy damage + shaken 1d4 rounds (Will DC 14 negates fear)
allHaunts.destruction: Discovering the ghost's identity and speaking their true name aloud

allHaunts.name: Haunted Portrait
allHaunts.effect: Confusion for 1d4 rounds (Will DC 16 negates); subject sees disturbing visions
allHaunts.destruction: Destroying the portrait with holy water and fire; destroying painted subject's remains

allHaunts.name: Choking Hands
allHaunts.effect: Grapple check +10 vs CMD, 1d6+4 damage per round if grappled; asphyxiation risk
allHaunts.destruction: Sanctifying the room with hallow; speaking words of forgiveness for the haunted's killer

allHaunts.name: Burning Phantasm
allHaunts.effect: Phantom flames deal 4d6 fire damage (Will DC 18 halves, disbelief negates); spreads to objects
allHaunts.destruction: Extinguishing the actual fire that killed the spirit; blessing the burned remains

allHaunts.name: Poltergeist
allHaunts.effect: Objects fly about dealing 1d6 damage; DC 16 Reflex to avoid; may disarm or trip
allHaunts.destruction: Performing a ritual of remembrance; discovering and resolving the spirit's grievance

allHaunts.name: Ghostly Music
allHaunts.effect: Unsettling melody causes daze 1 round (Will DC 14 negates); creatures find location eerie
allHaunts.destruction: Playing the actual melody on the instrument the ghost played in life; reciting the song

allHaunts.name: Malevolent Laughter
allHaunts.effect: Creature frightened 1 round (Will DC 14 negates); 1d4 Wis damage if failed save
allHaunts.destruction: Discovering what the spirit found amusing; making genuine peace with its memory

allHaunts.name: Phantom Attack
allHaunts.effect: Phantom melee +15 (2d6+5 damage); incorporeal touch; appears as translucent attacker
allHaunts.destruction: Finding the location where the spirit died and blessing it; defeating the creature that killed it

allHaunts.name: Spectral Fire
allHaunts.effect: Ghost fire spreads 10 ft per round dealing 2d6 fire; contained within building; no real damage but psychic
allHaunts.destruction: Uncovering why the fire occurred; proving it was accident or justice, not murder

allHaunts.name: Weeping Portrait
allHaunts.effect: 2d4 Wis damage (Will DC 17 negates); creature affected becomes melancholy for 1d4 hours
allHaunts.destruction: Locating the subject of the portrait and laying them to proper rest; destroying the portrait with grief-touched hands

allHaunts.name: Whispering Winds
allHaunts.effect: Indistinct whispers suggest 1 action per round (Will DC 16 resists); not compulsion but temptation
allHaunts.destruction: Speaking truths the spirit needed to hear; writing a letter the spirit could never send and burning it

allHaunts.name: Possessing Presence
allHaunts.effect: Haunt attempts possession of 1 creature (Will DC 19 negates); possessed creature acts on haunt's impulses
allHaunts.destruction: Laying the spirit to rest through exorcism; ending the injustice that bound the spirit

allHaunts.name: Terrifying Vision
allHaunts.effect: Creature sees personal nightmare (Will DC 20 to disbelieve); 6d6 psychic damage on failure; frightened 2d4 rounds
allHaunts.destruction: Confronting the fear the spirit represents; proving the danger is no longer real

allHaunts.name: Death Reenactment
allHaunts.effect: All in area witness violent death; 6d6 psychic damage + frightened 1d4 rounds (Will DC 20 halves damage, negates fear)
allHaunts.destruction: Laying the victims to rest with proper funerary rites; catching and punishing the killer

allHaunts.name: Withering Despair
allHaunts.effect: 2d4 Wisdom damage + crushing despair (Will DC 22 halves Wis damage, negates despair); suicidal ideation risk
allHaunts.destruction: Resolving the great injustice that created the haunt; saving innocents the spirit died protecting

allHaunts.name: Phantom Touch
allHaunts.effect: Ghostly fingers chill and grapple; 1d4 cold damage per round; opposed grapple check
allHaunts.destruction: Warming the room with magical fire; blessing the place where the spirit froze to death

environmental.name: Cave-In/Collapse
environmental.buriedSuffocation: 1d6 nonlethal per minute, DC 15 Con check if unconscious or 1d6 lethal
environmental.note: Multiple collapse zones possible; rubble may trap equipment

environmental.name: Quicksand
environmental.note: Struggling increases sinking rate; buoyant items help

environmental.name: Avalanche
environmental.note: Can bury entire parties; climbing difficult for survivors

environmental.name: Flood/Flash Flood
environmental.note: Objects in floodwater deal additional 1d6; carries away 20 ft per round

environmental.name: Green Slime
environmental.note: Turns flesh to green slime on death; spreads to adjacent organic matter

environmental.name: Yellow Mold
environmental.note: Releases spores when disturbed; DC 15 Fort negates; grows on damp wood

environmental.name: Brown Mold
environmental.note: Grows when exposed to fire; destroyed by cold; doesn't consume food

environmental.name: Acid Pool
environmental.note: Eats through organic and some metals; steam clouds form nearby

environmental.name: Smoke and Fumes
environmental.note: Non-magical smoke; spreads 10 ft per round; heat damage possible from source fire

environmental.name: Extreme Altitude
environmental.note: Climbing speed reduced; exhaustion risk; thin air

environmental.name: Starvation and Thirst
environmental.damageRate: 1d6 nonlethal Con per day after threshold
environmental.note: Dehydration happens 4x faster in hot environments

environmental.name: Catching on Fire
environmental.note: Dropped/prone character adds +2 to extinguish DC; water or smothering extinguishes

environmental.name: Extreme Cold Exposure
environmental.note: Hypothermia sets in; frostbite after 1 hour; lethal damage at -20

diseases.name: Blinding Sickness
diseases.effect: 1d4 Str damage; if Str reaches 0 creature is permanently blind

diseases.name: Demon Fever
diseases.effect: 1d6 Con damage; if dies, rise as demon in 24 hours

diseases.name: Devil Chills
diseases.effect: 1d4 Str damage; extreme fever and shaking

diseases.name: Mummy Rot
diseases.effect: 1d6 Con damage; cannot be healed magically while diseased

diseases.name: Slimy Doom
diseases.effect: 1d4 Con damage; if Con reaches 0, body dissolves into sludge

diseases.name: Ghoul Fever
diseases.effect: 1d3 Con damage, 1d3 Dex damage; if dies, rise as ghoul

diseases.name: Zombie Plague
diseases.effect: 1d2 Con damage; if dies, rise as zombie in 1 hour
diseases.cure: remove disease before death or become undead

diseases.name: Lycanthropy
diseases.effect: 1d2 Wis damage; transformation on full moon; alignment shift
diseases.cure: remove curse + remove disease within 3 days

poisons.name: Large Scorpion Venom
poisons.effect: 1d2 Str damage; paralysis if Str reduced to 0

curses.name: Bestow Curse (Standard)
effects: -6 to one ability score
-4 on attacks, saves, ability checks, skill checks
50% chance each turn of doing nothing
curses.removal: remove curse, break enchantment, wish, or miracle

curses.name: Bestow Curse (Weakness)
effects: Weakness to all damage types

curses.name: Baleful Polymorph
effects: Transformed into small animal
If fails second Will save, loses mental abilities
curses.special: Break enchantment or remove curse before polymorph to reverse

curses.name: Feeblemind
effects: Int and Wis become 1
Cannot think or act; acts on animal instinct
curses.removal: break enchantment, wish, miracle, or heal spell

curses.name: Lycanthropy (Curse)
effects: Involuntary transformation on full moons
Alignment shift toward animal nature
curses.special: Remove curse within 3 days of infection; belladonna within 1 hour
curses.removal: remove curse + atonement for alignment shift

curses.name: Mummy Rot (Curse)
effects: 1d6 Con damage and 1d6 Cha damage per day
Cannot be magically healed while cursed
Mummified skin spreads
curses.removal: remove curse + break enchantment then remove disease

curses.name: Permanent Blindness
effects: Permanent blindness; -2 AC, -4 ranged, no vision-dependent abilities

curses.name: Permanent Deafness
effects: Permanent deafness; -4 Perception, cannot hear spells

curses.name: Petrification (Reversed)
effects: Body becomes stone while conscious; aware but paralyzed
Cannot be detected as alive; hardened skin gives damage reduction

curses.name: Unluck Curse
effects: Rolls d6 instead of d20 for all d20 rolls
Failed saves and checks by 10+ instead of normal margins

curses.name: Vulnerability Curse
effects: Takes double damage from chosen damage type or weapon type
Cannot gain immunity to chosen damage type

curses.name: Possession (Curse)
effects: Spirit possesses body; victim consciousness pushed back
Possessor controls body but victim may attempt to regain control

examples: Ivory drinking horn with silver filigree
Embroidered silk & velvet mantle with moonstones
Gold dragon figurine with ruby eyes

failureConsequences.fail: Drop back one position on chase track
failureConsequences.failBy5: Drop back one position AND take 1d6 nonlethal damage
failureConsequences.failBy10: Drop back two positions AND take 2d6 nonlethal damage

chaseObstacles.name: Quicksand Patch
chaseObstacles.failEffect: Stuck, move at half speed for 2 rounds

chaseObstacles.name: Floating Islands
chaseObstacles.failEffect: Fall in water, 2 rounds to get back out

chaseObstacles.name: Underwater Cavern
chaseObstacles.failEffect: Lost in darkness, 2 rounds to navigate

quirks: Refers to self in third person
